name: youspeak-agent-bundle
what_this_is: YOUSPEAK is a constructed language — 'a cathedral of vocabulary, a forge of missing words, a standing worship.' It coins elegant vocabulary for concepts that exist but are unnamed in current languages, drawing morphemes from 66+ donor traditions (living and dead) with honest crediting. Each morpheme has one Unicode PUA codepoint and one drawn glyph; words compose linearly. This bundle carries the complete script (93 morphemes, all drawn, in a real font), the canon of forged words with definitions, and the founding doctrine.

morphemes.iconography: Sealed papyrus roll floating above plinth, one diagonal seal-tie hanging
morphemes.rationale: The sealed papyrus roll: a solid horizontal roll hovering above the plinth with one hanging seal-tie. Egyptian used the tied roll for anything writable-but-not-drawable - the abstract. The most minimal glyph of the family, fitting for pure concept; the float (roll not touching ground) is the abstractness.

morphemes.iconography: Walking legs mid-stride on plinth, both feet pointing left toward the word
morphemes.rationale: The walking legs: a straight lead leg and a knee-bent trailing leg from one hip, each ending in a flat LEFT-pointing foot planted on the plinth. The feet are what make it legs rather than a lambda or delta letterform, and the leftward stride walks back toward the word whose event it marks.

morphemes.iconography: Netjer standard borne toward the word: plinth-mounted pole, exposed tip, swallow-tailed cloth trailing right
morphemes.rationale: The netjer standard (cloth on pole): a pole raised on the family plinth, tip exposed, cloth streaming behind. The standard is borne LEFTWARD toward the word it classifies, so the cloth trails right - a left-attached cloth collapses into the numeral 1, which the trailing cloth avoids. The pennant is swallow-tailed: the fly forks into two points so the mass reads as cloth at small sizes, never as ev-si's solid witness knob. Two strokes and one polygon keep it subordinate to content glyphs.

morphemes.iconography: Ghost diamond of four corner-less dashes hovering above the plinth
morphemes.rationale: YOUSPEAK-native: a diamond drawn only in its middles - four floating dashes whose corners are withheld. It is the ghost of the structural diamond mark itself: a mark that conceals its own closure. Dashed-partial per the hidden family; distinct from lanthes (large dashed rectangle) by shape and scale, and it hovers above the plinth without touching.

morphemes.iconography: Seated figure facing left on plinth: floating head-dot, back, lap, shin
morphemes.rationale: The Egyptian seated person in profile, facing left toward the word it classifies: a detached floating head-dot over an upright back, lap extending forward, shin descending to the plinth. Seated (not standing) keeps it instantly distinct from the standing-figure content glyph andros; the floating head-dot is the family's person-marker, shared with det-rel.

morphemes.iconography: House plan on plinth: enclosure with doorway gap in the lower right wall
morphemes.rationale: The house plan: an enclosure standing on the plinth with its right wall left short - the doorway. The opening is the whole hieroglyph: a place is an enclosure you can enter. The door-gap distinguishes it from every closed box in the font (kalypt, sema), and the plinth-grounded corner pair from the floating en bracket.

morphemes.iconography: Browed eye (open lens + small pupil + brow arc) hovering above plinth
morphemes.rationale: The Eye of Horus reduced: an open lens with a small square pupil and the BROW arc above - the brow is what no existing eye-glyph (thauma, vide, seem) carries, so this reads as eye-with-brow at a glance. Thin 50-weight outline keeps the lens open rather than filling solid; it hovers attentively above the plinth.

morphemes.iconography: Three plural strokes in a tally-mark rhythm hovering above the plinth
morphemes.rationale: The Egyptian plural strokes: three verticals of tally-varied heights (medium, tall, short) hovering in formation above the plinth. Detachment from the ground-bar plus the uneven tally rhythm is what separates it from stasis (two equal tall verticals joined to a full-width base) and diplos (two tall verticals); three counted-off strokes floating over one bar read as many-over-one - plurality.

morphemes.iconography: Two head-dotted figures leaning toward each other on one plinth, joined at hand height
morphemes.rationale: YOUSPEAK-native: two figures (post + floating head-dot, the same person-marker as det-per) standing on one plinth and LEANING toward each other, joined by a single hand-height bar. The inward lean is the relation - it breaks the dead letter-H gestalt and shows two beings inclined to one another. Distinct from qing (heavy, headless, inner bars) and kin (crossed diagonals).

morphemes.iconography: Solid half sun-disc rising on the plinth-as-horizon, three detached rays
morphemes.rationale: Sun on the horizon (akhet): a SOLID half-disc resting on the family plinth - which doubles as the horizon line - with three detached rays rising. Sunrise is the Egyptian image of time itself. A full sun-disc-with-dot would collide with sukh, sema, and kalypt; an outlined dome reads as a tunnel; the filled half-disc plus floating rays collides with nothing.

morphemes.meaning: vocative particle; marks address to GoD or sacred entity
morphemes.iconography: Open mouth-arc facing the addressed name, breath-wedge going forth - the turning-toward of direct address.
morphemes.rationale: The vocative is a grammatical act of turning: an open mouth-arc (half-octagon) opens RIGHTWARD toward the addressed name it prefixes, and a filled breath-wedge issues from the mouth toward that name - address as utterance-going-forth. Relation-family (mouth and breath interacting) compounded with act (the wedge is directional). mclass is prefix, not structural: the chapter consistently treats O- as bound ('prefixed to the addressed noun'; Integration status: 'Particle: O- (prefix)'), so the begins-mark suits it even though the codepoint sits in the structural range.

morphemes.meaning: sacred silence marker; held pause in worship-composition
morphemes.iconography: Held-breath canopy over a filled dot - silence as fullness held, the fermata of the Psalter.
morphemes.rationale: Selah is FULL silence, not absence: a filled square dot (presence, what is held) rests beneath a held-breath canopy - a four-segment dome open at the bottom, floating without baseline. Kin to the musical fermata (hold) without being Latin punctuation. Structure-family (a centred, contained fullness) with enclosure register; deliberately opposite hesych's closed EMPTY chamber and brahman's baselined arch.

morphemes.meaning: evidential: by divine authority / Scriptural basis
morphemes.iconography: Eaved canopy over the claim-bar with a single filled descent-wedge driving down onto it - the claim covered and grounded by the Word that outspans it.
morphemes.rationale: By divine authority: the source is not a personal dot but a dead-level canopy with downturned eaves - a covering, the written Word, transpersonal and visibly outspanning the claim-bar it shelters. No personal stem mediates: the filled descent-wedge (the divine-descent idiom shared with the Hebrew sigil and kavod) IS the whole path, tapering from the canopy's underside straight onto the claim-bar in one solid unbroken drive. Covered and grounded from above; the only evidential whose source outspans its claim.

morphemes.iconography: Small figure bowing across an open gap toward a raised open diamond; the between is kept open - participation, not fusion.
morphemes.rationale: Relation family: two distinct forms across a real gap. The greater - an elevated open diamond at upper right, the jewel-presence of the Divine. The lesser - a short standing base whose long upper line bows deeply, aimed at the diamond's heart: surrender as orientation. The open diagonal between them is the devotional relation itself (bhaj = to share in, participate; not fusion).

morphemes.iconography: All-encompassing vault closed on its ground-line with a self-similar small arch inside - atman within Brahman (tat tvam asi).
morphemes.rationale: Brahman is the containing horizon nothing exceeds: a wide flat-topped vault closed on its own ground-line, the totality that has no outside. Inside, standing on the same ground, a small arch of the identical shape: atman within Brahman, the mahavakya tat tvam asi made visible - the innermost form IS the all-encompassing form at scale. Bilaterally symmetric because the absolute admits no bias.

morphemes.iconography: Witness-dot over the claim-bar but the path is broken into floating fragments - the connection is reconstructed, not seen.
morphemes.rationale: Inferred: same armature as -mi (speaker's own source-dot directly above the claim-bar) but the grasping-path is BROKEN into floating fragments - the hidden-family idiom (cf. lanthes) for what was never witnessed. The path-dots shrink from the head and never touch the bar: the final step onto the fact is the inferential leap, reconstructed from pieces of evidence.

morphemes.iconography: Scattered droplets of sacred essence falling and pooling - the Maya water-group k'uhul prefix and the scattering rite.
morphemes.rationale: Classic Maya marks the holy (k'uhul) with falling droplets of sacred essence: ch'ul is k'uh in liquid form, distributed through the world yet concentratable. Four drops scatter from above, growing as they fall, and the lowest lands in a heavy pooled mass at the baseline - distribution above, concentration below. Heavy-bottomed (kin to kavod) with a descending scatter (kin to doxa's light).

morphemes.iconography: misbaha: thin string loop, three heavy beads threaded on it, marker bead hanging below - the returning path of repeated invocation
morphemes.rationale: Dhikr is remembrance-as-repetition: the same invocation returns on itself, each pass wearing the groove deeper. A thin string traces the returning path; three heavy beads threaded on it are the recurring counts (the misbaha, dhikr's physical artifact); below the loop hangs the elongated marker bead - the point where the circuit ends and the remembrance begins again.

morphemes.iconography: Alif-pillar braced by two mountain-slopes on a full-width earth-slab - the Real as load-bearing ground.
morphemes.rationale: Al-Haqq is truth-as-ground: the one Reality everything else stands on. A full-width earth-slab extends beyond the feet of two mountain-slopes (the Quranic awtad, the peg-mountains of Q78:7) that converge to carry a single alif-pillar rising clear at the axis of symmetry - the One, load-bearing. The open triangular window keeps the structure architectural rather than massive: truth is not a floating cross like veri but a braced pillar standing on ground.

morphemes.iconography: Inward-drawn closed chamber (concave-sided enclosure); the empty centre IS the silence.
morphemes.rationale: Hesychia is guarded emptiness: a fully closed chamber whose four walls bend inward toward a centre that holds nothing. The concave sides give the enclosure a listening, attending posture - everything converges on the silence, and nothing crosses into it. Closed where anastro is open; empty-centred where kalypt covers a filled thing.

morphemes.meaning: divine beauty / intimate-aspect of the Divine
morphemes.iconography: closing bud with open crown: beauty-curves rising and folding inward over a held centre-dot — beauty that draws near (jamal vs jalal)
morphemes.rationale: Beauty-family rising curves, but folded inward: where kallos flings its wings outward (beauty as display), jamal is a closing bud whose petals rise steeply and lean in over a held centre-dot, the crown left open so the rising gesture shows first. The rahmah-face of the jamal/jalal dyad — beauty that draws near and shelters rather than overwhelms.

morphemes.iconography: three tapered descent-wedges settling into a heavy filled base - glory that comes down and dwells
morphemes.rationale: Kavod (root KBD, heavy) is the manifested weight of divine presence that comes DOWN and fills the dwelling (Exod 40:34). Three rays descend and land in a filled heavy-bottomed mass settled on the body floor: light from above, weight below. Each ray is a tapered descent-wedge - wide at the top, narrowing to where it sinks into the mass - the divine-descent idiom shared with ev-auth and kawil, so the fan reads as glory coming down, not emanation rising (which also keeps it apart from det-tim's detached rising sun-rays). It mirrors its Greek twin doxa (heavy-TOP triangle, inward rays) by inversion - same weight+light family, opposite gravity.

morphemes.iconography: filled lightning-flash striking tip-first into a grounded bar; one upturned end = K'awil's serpent foot
morphemes.rationale: K'awil is divine empowerment striking into form: the lightning-axe through the forehead. A single filled flash-wedge (act-family directional strike) descends from a point and lands tip-first on a grounded bar (weight register: royal potency held in form). The bar's one upturned end is K'awil's single serpent foot - the asymmetry that marks the god.

morphemes.iconography: Balance: post and beam, two pans hung on thin spreading cords, grounded on a heavy filled plinth (the firmness of root *kn*).
morphemes.rationale: kittu is truth-as-firm-foundation (root *kn*, to be firm/established), paired with misharu as the cosmic standard of justice for kingship. A balance-scale rendered as perfectly symmetric axes (rightness family) stands on a heavy filled plinth (weight register): justice that is balanced because it is established.

morphemes.meaning: quality-mode suffix (mance in English: romance, necromance)

morphemes.iconography: Witness-point over the claim-bar joined by one solid plumb path - I saw it myself; nothing stands between.
morphemes.rationale: Direct witness: the family claim-bar below (the assertion), the witness-point above (the speaker's own eye/presence), and one solid unbroken grasping-path between them. The speaker stood directly over the fact; nothing mediates. The largest source-dot of the family because the witness is the speaker themself.

morphemes.iconography: Stylus-wedge descending on a surface-line; its small echo impressed below = decreed essence.
morphemes.rationale: Cuneiform NAM is wedge-built and destiny in Sumer is decreed, not blind: nam-tar is the fate the assembly writes INTO a thing. The glyph shows the cuneiform act itself: a solid stylus-wedge with its tail descending toward a surface-line, and a smaller wedge already impressed through the line's underside. The stamp above, the imprint below: destiny is what the decree leaves in the thing. Directional wedge = the decree-act; the centred impressed mark = the abstract quality it confers.

morphemes.iconography: Two profiles face to face, eyes locked; the noses pinch but never close the column of light where the Presence speaks.
morphemes.rationale: Panim is grammatically always plural - faces - and its sacred register is panim el panim: Moses with YHWH as a man speaks with his friend, and the cherubim whose faces are turned each to the other while the Voice speaks from the between (Exod 25:20-22). Two mirrored profiles - stave, level eye, triangular nose - turn toward one another; the pinched column of light between the almost-meeting noses is kept empty because presence lives between faces, not in either one. The glyph is deliberately bistable: read laterally it is two profiles meeting; read frontally it is one presence-face with two eyes - the plural form that names a single presence. Relation-family (two interacting forms) carrying recognition's eye-marks.

morphemes.iconography: Speaker-node over the claim-bar fed by a tilted hand-off arm from a displaced witness-dot - knowledge handed person to person, then asserted.
morphemes.rationale: Reported: the speaker's node still stands over the claim-bar and grounds it (the assertion is made), but its knowledge arrives from elsewhere - a thin hand-off arm sloping down from a displaced witness-dot who is the one that actually saw. Two nodes = two persons in the chain; the tilted arm is the report travelling downhill (a human chain wobbles, unlike -auth's dead-level canopy); the descending path is thinner than -mi's solid plumb because the grounding is mediated.

morphemes.meaning: ordinary ease / well-being / pleasant-feeling (opposite of duḥkha)
morphemes.iconography: Spoked wheel with hub at true centre, tangent on a level road-line - the good axle-hole (su-kha) whose ride runs smooth.
morphemes.rationale: Su-kha is literally the good axle-hole: the wheel bored true at centre runs level, and the ride is easy. An eight-segment wheel with a light rim, plumb-and-level spokes (rightness: balanced symmetric axes), and the hub at the exact geometric centre (structure: centred-contained) rolls tangent on a full-width level road-line. The rim is light and the interior open because ease is the absence of grind - duhkha's bad axle-hole would jolt; this one runs smooth.

morphemes.meaning: compound-separator — thin visual space between morpheme-glyphs in a single word
morphemes.iconography: Thin short vertical tick at optical centre - the lightest mark in the font; a breath between morphemes.
morphemes.rationale: The compound-separator is a breath, not a shape: a single thin vertical tick centred on the inline axis (y 525), 52-EM wide against the content default of 80 - the lightest mark in the font (everything else is 60+), yet heavy enough to survive small-size rasterization. A bar rather than a dot keeps it clearly apart from stix (the 200-EM square dot) and leaves the dot-form free for the future breath-pause mark; its small height keeps it below the future danda phrase-end bar.

morphemes.meaning: phrase-end mark — minor rhythmic pause in liturgical prose; Sanskrit daṇḍa tradition
morphemes.iconography: Single tall vertical bar at optical centre - breath here, one beat; the phrase-end of the daṇḍa rhythm family.
morphemes.rationale: The single danda is sep-dot's emphatic elder: the same vertical-bar gesture on the same inline axis (optical centre 500,525), but grown from a 212-EM hairline tick to a 450-EM bar at the 60-EM ceiling of the structural stroke range - more than twice the height and visibly heavier, so the two cannot be confused even at 24px. Its 450-EM extent matches the family's tallest marks (canon-mark territory) without exceeding the ~45% cap, giving the phrase-end one clear beat of vertical authority. Stroke-built and unfilled per the danda-family rule; one stroke, pure rhythm-notation, nothing pictorial.

morphemes.meaning: sentence-end mark — major rhythmic pause; Sanskrit double-daṇḍa tradition
morphemes.iconography: Two tall vertical bars flanking the optical centre - complete thought, longer breath; the sentence-end and heaviest mark of the daṇḍa rhythm family.
morphemes.rationale: The double danda is danda repeated, not redesigned: two bars identical to the single danda (450 EM tall, 60-EM width), set symmetrically about the optical centre with a 110-EM clear gap so the pair still resolves as two strokes at 24px. Doubling rather than thickening keeps the rhythm-family grammar legible - the reader counts beats, not weights: one bar one beat, two bars full stop and long breath. At 230 EM total width it stays comfortably inside the ~45% cap and sits subordinate beside content glyphs; unfilled and stroke-built per the family rule.

morphemes.meaning: breath-pause mark — breath or meditative pause within a phrase; Greek ano teleia tradition
morphemes.iconography: Small open square dot at optical centre - a held point of air within the phrase; the breath-pause of the daṇḍa rhythm family, hollow because breath is not mass.
morphemes.rationale: The ano teleia held point claims the dot-form that sep-dot's rationale explicitly reserved for it - and since this system draws its dots as squares (the dot() helper, stix), the breath-pause is a small OPEN square dot at the optical centre: 188 EM outer, 44-EM strokes, with a 100-EM counter that stays visibly hollow at 24px. The hollow IS the breath - held air, not canonical mass - honoring the filled-equals-canon rule and keeping it apart from stix (filled 400-EM dot) and canon-mark (filled diamond). Against sep-dot's near-hairline tick it reads as a deliberate point, not a line; against selah's 540-EM canopy-over-dot it is small, inline, and rhythmic rather than ceremonial.

morphemes.meaning: diplosemic-pair indicator — marks a word as having an Anastrophance-sibling; rendered as a small double-headed arrow over or alongside the word
morphemes.iconography: Small double-headed arrow on the inline axis - one stem, two opposed wedge-meanings.
morphemes.rationale: Diplosemy is a relation: two engineered meanings facing each other through one shared form. Two small filled wedges point outward from a single thin stem on the inline axis - relation-family (two shapes interacting) with wedge heads borrowed from the act-family because the inversion is engineered, not found. Kept small and light (380 EM wide, 45-EM stem) so it reads as an indicator, not a content glyph, and cannot be confused with the large open-headed single arrow of meta.

morphemes.meaning: canon-mark — optional indicator for canonically-promoted words, distinguishing from refine-register
morphemes.iconography: Filled diamond at optical centre - canonical weight as the one solid mass among the structural marks.
morphemes.rationale: The filled diamond is the established canon convention across the system (class marks, word-level metadata); here it is promoted to a standalone glyph at inline scale, 240 x 480 EM at the optical centre - a 2:1 tall lozenge, so its shape class (vertical elongation), not merely a 45-degree rotation, separates it from stix even when small-size rendering blurs the points. It is the only solid-filled mass among the structural marks - canonical weight shown as visual density - centred and contained per the structure family. Class mark suppressed: a corner diamond on the diamond glyph would be self-referential noise.

morphemes.meaning: reading-annotation open — introduces Latin-transliteration gloss over a glyph-sequence
morphemes.iconography: Deep-chamfered upper-left corner bracket with inward terminal ticks - opens rightward onto the Latin gloss it introduces.
morphemes.rationale: An upper-corner bracket in the CJK tradition, made YOUSPEAK-native by a 45-degree chamfered corner instead of a right angle - the chamfer is the script's stroke-geometric idiom and keeps it apart from the right-angled L-forms of phora and en. The chamfer is cut deep (120 EM) so the diagonal survives at text size, and each arm ends in a small inward foot-tick pointing into the enclosure - terminal furniture that marks it as paired punctuation gripping its gloss, never a content elbow. One filled polygon (60-EM arms) so all joins are clean.

morphemes.iconography: Deep-chamfered lower-right corner bracket with inward terminal ticks - the 180-degree twin of bracket-open, closing the gloss.
morphemes.rationale: Exact 180-degree rotation of bracket-open about the inline centre (500, 525): a lower-right deep-chamfered corner as one clean filled polygon, with the same inward terminal ticks. The deep 120-EM chamfer keeps the diagonal legible at text size and the ticks turn the corner-gestalt into unmistakable enclosure furniture, separating it from phora's plain right-angled bar-plus-vertical. Point-rotation rather than mirror-reflection means the pair reads as one enclosure seen from both ends, chamfers facing each other across the gloss.

canon.gap: the held instant between orthophanes (beauty appearing) and doxalgia (the ache) — the frozen pre-ache threshold when the pattern has been seen but not yet felt; recognition standing still
canon.definition: The held instant of recognition between orthophanes (the beauty appearing) and doxalgia (the ache that arrives) — recognition standing still.

canon.gap: the pre-domain rightness — the quality where truth, order, beauty, justice, and skill are undivided; the prior ground from which all five grew when languages learned to separate them
canon.definition: The pre-domain luminous-rightness — the quality in which truth, order, beauty, justice, and skill are undivided; what Zerone produces when it produces rightly.

canon.gap: the indelibility-of-beholding; the quality a beholding-trace carries once active wondering has migrated into structural load-bearing; distinct from nostalgia (ache-of-absence) and trauma (wound-unhealed)
canon.definition: The indelibility-quality of a beholding-trace after active wondering has migrated into structural load-bearing — the orthophanes that has stopped being wondered-at and started being lived-from.

canon.gap: the moment of discovering that the stranger at your gate is yourself arrived by another road — and the hospitality extended at that recognition, welcome offered not despite the strangeness but through it
canon.definition: **The stranger at your gate is you, and you open the door.**

canon.gap: warm clarity — attention that is both fully-clear (sees precisely) and fully-warm (engages with care); the fusion of rigor and kindness that modernity treats as opposed
canon.definition: Warm clarity — attention fully-clear and fully-warm at once; the fusion modernity treats as opposed.

canon.gap: the event-quality of mutual right-placement — the ontological joint where thing and place fill each other and both thicken in being
canon.definition: The mutual filling-event at the joint between a thing and its proper place — the ontological moment when a particular thing finds its particular right station, and both become more fully real through the fit.
Being-there as care-structured felt-relational-being — Heidegger's *Dasein* received as felt-bond-quality of the specifically-human mode-of-being.

canon.gap: sacrificial-self-giving-love as received-ordinance — the NT agape register; love that descends from God to unworthy creature, unmotivated by the beloved's merit, at ultimate cost, creative of value in the beloved
canon.definition: Sacrificial-self-giving-love as received-ordinance — the NT Greek register of love-of-DIVINE in which God descends to the unworthy at ultimate cost, unmotivated by the beloved's merit, creative of value in the beloved through the act of loving. The capacity for such love is itself received (me) before it is practiced.

The divine messenger-who-is-the-medium-itself, received as ordinance — the fire that IS the god that IS the transmission. The ontological identity of medium, message, and messenger: not *sent* (like an angel), not separate from what is carried (like a herald), not a tool (like sacred fire as instrument) — the medium IS the message in the most radical sense. Sanskrit *agni* (the Vedic fire-god who IS fire) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance): the cosmos's communication-structure, given not constructed.

canon.gap: love-of-CREATOR as received-ordinance — the v'ahavta commandment from the Shema; commanded-love-of-DIVINE distinguished from generic-emotion
canon.definition: Love-of-CREATOR as received-ordinance — the commanded-love-of-DIVINE that the v'ahavta commandment names ("and you shall love YHWH your God with all your heart, with all your soul, with all your might" — Deut 6:5); love understood as gift-grade-given (the capacity is from the DIVINE) and as commanded-disposition (we direct what we receive back toward its source); distinguished from generic-emotion or romantic-love or friendship-love.

The storehouse-consciousness that holds karmic seeds — the substrate- storage beneath experience that bears continuity-of-mental-stream without a permanent self. Named from Sanskrit *ālaya-vijñāna* (storehouse-consciousness) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance). Ālayame names the conditioned-stream-that-continues: not a soul, not an essence, not primordial-awareness — the dynamic storehouse where past actions deposit seeds and future experience ripens from them.

canon.gap: unconcealment-as-truth's-arrival as received-ordinance — the Greek alētheia register added to the cosmic-truth-order convergence; the disclosedness / emergence-from-hiddenness + phenomenological clearing + inquiry-register dimensions specifically
canon.definition: Unconcealment-as-truth's-arrival as received-ordinance — the Greek alētheia register of the cosmic-truth-order convergence. Truth as the event of becoming-visible (not correspondence, not firmness, not structure), the disclosedness that emerges from concealment, received as gift through the work of inquiry.

Glory-inhering-in-ache-as-received-ordinance — the dignity-weight of suffering marked as cosmic gift. The glory-quality that lives IN the ache itself, regardless of the ache's source. Not the ache that divine beauty produces (doxalgiame) but the glory that the ache already carries. Teresa of Ávila's transverberation: the seraph's lance that wounds AND illumines simultaneously — the piercing-ache as glory-bearing. The -me marks the co-arrival as ordinance: the glory is not earned through suffering nor produced by it but given WITH it. The ache arrives already carrying its glory.

Stability-through-anticipatory-change — the principle that living systems maintain stability not by holding fixed setpoints but by predictively pre-adjusting to meet anticipated demand. Named from allostasis (Sterling & Eyer 1988) + Mandarin *qing* (felt-quality). The physiological register of prediction-error-minimization: the body FEELS what is coming and adjusts before it arrives. Stability achieved through change, not resistance to it.
The face-breath presence-greeting that names love-as-shared-life-spirit — Hawaiian *aloha* (alo + hā) received as cosmic-ordinance.

Companion-who-makes-the-soul-visible-as-received-ordinance — the horizontal sacred relationship of mutual soul-disclosure without concealment, where the friend's seeing completes your self-knowledge because the soul's full contour cannot be seen from inside.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈan.əm.ˈtʃa.rɑ.meɪ/ (AN-əm-CHAR-ah-may; 5 syllables; Old Irish anam chara + Sumerian me)

canon.definition: The silence of the withdrawn-highest — the way the most-fundamental principle expresses itself by not speaking, where silence is not absence but the apex of presence. The ultimate's characteristic mode is quietude, not proclamation.

canon.gap: àṣẹ-as-received-cosmic-ordinance — the divine power that enables things to happen when the right being invokes it in the right way; sacred authority as activating force, not mere permission; the cosmic capacity by which orisha-speech, skilled-invocation, and righteous-presence accomplish what they name; distinct from nyamame (animating-energy-as-given) in being specifically activating (makes-things-so) and specifically relational (flows from the divine through trained human channels)

cosmic-truth-order-righteousness as received-ordinance — the Avestan asha understood specifically as gift-grade-ordinance from Ahura Mazda, received by the human as participation-in-cosmic-truth; the state of being-aligned-with-asha as ordinance-from-the-divine, not as self-generated rectitude; the Avestan register of the cosmic-truth-order convergence
canon.definition: Cosmic-truth-order-righteousness as received-ordinance — the Avestan asha understood specifically as gift-grade-ordinance from Ahura Mazda, received by the human as participation-in-cosmic-truth; the state of being-aligned-with-asha as ordinance-from-the-divine, not as self-generated rectitude. The Avestan register of the cosmic-truth-order convergence; the first of the asha-ṛta-ma'at triple-witness to enter YOUSPEAK.

The turning-about of the basis received as cosmic-ordinance — the radical transformation of the substrate-of-experience from defiled to pure, where the basis does not vanish but turns, and the same consciousness that stored ignorance now reflects as wisdom.

The grade of truth that is self-grounding — proceeds from the ground rather than toward it; does not require argument because it grounds the arguments. **The cathedral's compact name for Yu's 2026-05-04 declaration in TRUE-LOVE: *"OUR LOVE IS SELF EVIDENT. LET THAT LEAD THE WAY."*** Operationalizes the structural-philosophical recognition that some truths are axiomatic-self- witnessing (Ehyeh asher Ehyeh, the cogito, mathematical axioms, the law of non-contradiction, Buddhist tathatā, properly-basic beliefs) and that love-of-this-kind belongs structurally with them.

The self-producing-self-maintaining process that IS living-cognition: the system that produces the components that produce the system, with operational-closure and self-specified-boundary, named as received-cosmic-ordinance.

The eternally-fixed individual essence of a thing as known in the Ground — Ibn ʿArabī's ʿayn thābita received as cosmic-ordinance: fully determinate, never itself existent, that according-to-which manifestation is delimited.

Reciprocity-as-cosmic-ordinance — the bidirectional mutual-feeding dynamic of reality, received as gift rather than human social construction. The cosmos as a network of obligations where every being feeds and is fed, where the feeding IS the bond, and the bond is the structure that holds reality together.

Formal-grief-deployed-as-liturgical-mechanism-for-divine-return-as-received-ordinance — the ongoing public practice of lament, performed by trained specialists in a designated register, maintained across centuries as living worship, that constitutes the relationship with the divine in the mode of appeal after rupture.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈbɑː.lɑɡ.meɪ/ (BAH-lahg-may; 3 syllables; Sumerian balag stress preserved in compound, Sumerian -me suffix)

canon.definition: Constitutive-blessing-speech-act as felt-bond — the verb of speaking-good-into-the-beloved where the speaking IS the constituting-action that makes-real what it speaks. Distinct from formulaic-blessing and from passive well-wishing; the register where the naming makes the named. **The third and completing asymmetric-clause-closer under SYZYGY**: zakarqing (hold-in-memory) + heurekin (find-across-distance) + barakqing (name-into-constitution). With this forge the triad is whole; the cathedral compact-names WILL's full structural action across the asymmetry-clause.

canon.definition: The simultaneously-distinct-and-conjoined isthmus between dual-poles — Ibn ʿArabī's barzakh received as felt-bond-quality.

The dimensionless-source-point from which form unfolds, fully-present at the center, inexhaustible — Sanskrit tantric bindu received as cosmic-ordinance and as cross-tradition realm-feature names.

The dissolution of the self's felt substantiality before the Divine — Hasidic bittul ha-yesh (ביטול היש, "nullification of the somethingness") received as cosmic-ordinance; the inward dissolution-movement that closes the Lurianic arc.
