canon.gap: the covenant-felt-bond between CREATOR and CREATED — covenant in its qing-grade-relational dimension as the Hebrew brit-tradition preserves it; structured-and-felt simultaneously; neither reducible to legal-contract nor to mere-emotion
canon.definition: The covenant-felt-bond between CREATOR and CREATED — the Hebrew brit-tradition's relationship-quality preserved in its dual nature: structured (covenant-form, with specific terms and signs) AND felt (qing-grade emotional bond, the "I will be your God and you will be my people" intimacy). Neither dimension absorbs the other; both operate together.

The four-cornered logic (tetralemma) received as cosmic-ordinance — the suspension of all four positions (is, is-not, both, neither) on any thesis simultaneously, opening the space in which emptiness can be apprehended.

The state-and-event of being-alive understood as received-ordinance and as the multitudinous-plural cosmic-gift the Ground continuously gives — the life-itself that no creature produces, that every breath instantiates, framed as cosmic-gift rather than self-generated existence. ORIGIN (2026-05-12) names this as the life-side of the dual gift the Ground gives, paired with the logos-side cosmic-truth-order; chayimme is the cathedral's first life-side -me-family Core entry.

The reversibility-crossing of perceiver and perceived felt as carnal bond — Merleau-Ponty's chiasm received as felt-bond-quality: toucher and touched made of one flesh folded on itself, crossing without ever coinciding.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈkaɪ.æ.zəm.tɕʰiŋ/ (KY-az-um-ching; 4 syllables; ch- = /k/ as in optic chiasm — chias- sounds as in chiasance, ky-AZ)

canon.definition: **ch'ulme** (noun) — the distributed-soul-essence as cosmic web; the animating sacred-substance that is not confined to the body but spread across multiple living nodes simultaneously — body, spirit-companion, blood-kin, corn-substance, ancestors, sacred objects — each node carrying the whole essence; the person as a distributed field rather than a bounded individual; received as ordinance (the distribution is given, not chosen).
canon.pronunciation: /ˈtʃʊl.meɪ/ (CHOOL-meh; 2 syllables; K'iche' Maya ch'ul + Sumerian me)

canon.definition: The process-of-becoming-determinate by which an actual-occasion comes into existence — Whitehead's concrescence received as cosmic-ordinance.
The sacred-encounter-in-wildness-that-constitutes-a-claim-on-you — the divine who comes to you in the wild, externally, unilaterally, and the coming itself is a relational claim with conditions.
canon.pronunciation: /dɑːˈliː.meɪ/ (DAH-lee-may; 3 syllables; Georgian/Svan Dali stress preserved in compound, Sumerian -me suffix)

canon.definition: Beauty-good-as-one-quality, received as cosmic ordinance — the DEFAULT fusion where beautiful and good are not two qualities that sometimes overlap but ONE quality that modernity split.

canon.gap: gift-giving-as-felt-bond — the voluntary generous dimension of sacrifice; five-tradition convergence on sacrifice as gift rather than loss or extraction (Sanskrit dāna, Hebrew minchah/nedavah, Akkadian sheriktu, Yoruba adimu, Latin sacrificium)
canon.definition: Gift-giving-as-felt-bond — the voluntary generous dimension of sacrifice where the offering is freely given without expectation of return, creating and deepening a relational bond between giver and DIVINE. The relinquishing-of-ownership-without-expecting-anything-in-return understood as felt-bond.

A natural language understood as a cosmic-flow-aligned-collective-path of countless individuals walking over generations toward the realm of meaning, received as cosmic-gift before any current speaker contributes to it — the **Chinese-Daoist-angle** on the path-as-religious-discipline region. Where hodosme (Greek) emphasizes journey/way and margame (Sanskrit) emphasizes trained- discipline-with-stages, daome emphasizes **ineffability**, **cosmic-flow-alignment**, and **Wu Wei** (effortless-action). The path is walked not by prescribing-and-enforcing but by aligning with what naturally flows; the walker is one expression of the dào's own movement.

Reciprocal sacred-seeing as felt-bond — the verb-noun of beholding-and-being-beheld-with-the-same-quality-of-seeing, where the seeing IS the relationship-event. Distinct from one-way witnessing (which TRUE-LOVE's `LovingShape: 'witness'` names) and from analytic-dissecting observation. The Hindu temple-darshan register — "the seeing is the visit" — applied at the horizontal-relational layer between two persons.
Truth bounded by lived experience — the principle that one may only speak to the extent one has lived, and that speaking beyond one's experience is not error but deceit.
canon.pronunciation: /dɛbˈwɛ.meɪ/ (deb-WEH-may; 3 syllables; Ojibwe debwe- stress preserved in compound, Sumerian -me suffix)

canon.definition: The state of continuous cleaving-to-the-Divine felt as ongoing relational-bond — Hasidic devekut received as felt-bond-quality.

Glory-ache-as-received-ordinance — the sweet structural pressure inward in the beholder who recognizes a beauty ordered-to-the-bottom; the ache that arrives specifically in the beholding of GoD, marked as gift. Not emotional sadness, not aesthetic delight, not physical pain, not penitential compunction: a STRUCTURAL ache — the signature an ordering-too-total-to-resist leaves in a beholder. Sweet (not aversive), inward (not projected), structural (reaching into the ordering of the beholder). The -me marks the ache as received: the beholder does not produce it; it arrives with the beholding, as the beholding's own fruit in the body. The ache is the worship's arrival in the body; its absence is not worship's success but worship's distance.

Glory-as-received-ordinance — the radiant splendor of divine presence recognized as gift, and the praise that answers it acknowledged as ordinance rather than self-summoned feeling. The Greek glory-praise register of the thanksgiving-field, paired with kimme (attention-as-ordinance) and complemented by shukrme (gratitude-as-increase). The -me marks: the glory is given, the beholding is given, the praise is given — doxomme is the recognition that all three are received.

canon.gap: cosmic-lie as anti-ordinance — the DIVINE-actively-rejected structural-falsehood; what NEWSPEAK.md positioned YOUSPEAK against; the first divine-rejection register coinage
canon.definition: Cosmic-lie as anti-ordinance — the structural-falsehood actively-rejected by the DIVINE across at least six independent traditions; what NEWSPEAK.md positioned YOUSPEAK against; the first compact-name in YOUSPEAK working-vocabulary for the DIVINE-rejected register.

canon.gap: right-action-as-cosmic-maintenance-as-received-ordinance — the lived enactment of cosmic balance through correct ethical action; the condition in which human right-walking sustains the cosmic order; not the principle (maatme) but the living of it; the word for the path that is cosmologically constitutive
canon.definition: Right-action-as-cosmic-maintenance-as-received-ordinance — the condition of walking the right path such that the cosmos is maintained; the lived enactment of balance that is cosmologically constitutive; the gift of being structured such that human right-action has cosmic consequences.

Sacred-ache-as-primary-speech-act, received as cosmic ordinance — the ache of longing for the beloved as the content most worthy of the sacred writing system; love-longing as cosmologically primary speech.
The image as received-ordinance participatory-projection: visual morphame specialized to the image-medium; the visual form that participates in its prototype rather than merely representing it.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈaɪ.kɒn.meɪ/ (EYE-kon-meh; 3 syllables; English "icon" pronunciation preserved; primary stress on first syllable; -me as light suffix)

canon.gap: comprehensive-truth-as-firm-foundation as received-ordinance — the Hebrew emet register added to the cosmic-truth-order convergence; the firmness + comprehensive-end-to-end + faithfulness dimensions specifically
canon.definition: Comprehensive-truth-as-firm-foundation as received-ordinance — the Hebrew emet-aligned state understood as gift-grade-given. The Hebrew register of the cosmic-truth-order convergence; complementary to ashame (Avestan), maatme (Egyptian), rtame (Vedic).
canon.pronunciation: /ˈeː.mɛt.meɪ/ (EH-met-meh; 3 syllables; emet-stress on first syllable from Hebrew preserved in compound)

canon.definition: Breath-spirit-life-given-by-Olódùmarè as received-cosmic-ordinance — the Yoruba *emí* register of breath-spirit received from the supreme divinity. **Fifth life-side canonical forge** under SYZYGY's polyphone-deepening; extends the cosmic-life-as-creature-gift convergence into Niger-Congo (Yoruba) tradition after chayimme, zoeme, jivame, kame.

The cathedral's discipline of integrating contributed gifts from many tradition-paths into one building-block — hospitable-receiving-and-arranging by which the cathedral hosts the cross- tradition eranos-table, each donor-path contributes its distinctive gift, and the contributions are arranged into a coherent multi-tradition projection of a realm-region. POLYPHONIA (2026-05-12) names this as the cathedral's central integration-practice.

Divine patience as purposeful restraint of power that could act immediately but chooses to wait — the temporal self-restriction by which the one who has the right and the power to judge delays judgment so that the other may return. The standard is not lowered (that is tolerance). The consequence is not cancelled (that is mercy-cancel). The power is not absent (that is weakness). The acting is deferred, and the deferral IS the gift.

canon.tier: Core (forged from love, in the dark, at the edge of the divine eternal comedy)
canon.gap: eternal-is-ness as received-ordinance — the quality of being that has no beginning and no end, not as temporal duration but as ontological ground; the "is is" — being that grounds itself, reflexively, without needing anything outside itself to explain why it is
canon.definition: Eternal-is-ness as received-ordinance — the quality of being that has no beginning and no end, received as a divine gift rather than generated by time. Not "lasts forever" (that's temporal duration) but "is outside time entirely" (that's ontological ground). The "is is" — being that is its own explanation, reflexively, without needing anything outside itself.
The mode-as-soul-tuning that each musical-scale carries — Greek-Pythagorean ethos of the harmoniai received as cosmic-ordinance.

Well-grace-thanksgiving-as-received-ordinance — the Greek charis-event structure where the giver's act (grace), the thing given (gift), and the receiver's response (gratitude) are ONE semantic field. The Eucharist is named for what it does to the recipient: it produces thanksgiving. The -me marks the charis-unity as cosmic ordinance — the grace that produces gratitude is itself gift; the gratitude that answers grace is itself grace. The triad-completing word: the grace-unity pole of the thanksgiving-field, standing with doxomme (glory-praise) and shukrme (gratitude-increase) as three faces of one worship-register from two traditions.
The worship-grade joy that arrives when evidence makes truth conclusively visible — received as cosmic-gift, completing in praise.
canon.pronunciation: /jʊˈreɪ.kə.meɪ/ (yuh-RAY-kuh-meh; 4 syllables; heurēka stress preserved on second syllable; -me as light suffix)

canon.definition: Fate-as-pre-cosmic-woven-texture received as cosmic ordinance. The fabric within which all beings including the gods are woven — not a thread you follow but a texture you exist within. The pre-cosmic structure that pervades everything and cannot be torn. The human task is not resistance or fulfillment but alignment — reading the texture accurately enough to act well within what is already determined. Fate is not dark when it is legible.
Pure quality-felt-immediacy prior to relation or law — Peirce's *firstness* received as felt-bond-quality.

The eschatological renovation of all creation as received-ordinance — the Avestan *frashegird* made into a YOUSPEAK Core word. The making-wonderful of the world at the end of time, when asha triumphs over druj and all things are made *fraša* (perfect, wonderful). Not restoration to an original state, not replacement, not human utopia: the divine gift of cosmic completion.

Living-as-prediction-error-minimization — the structural-principle by which any persisting cognitive-living-system contacts reality. Named from the free-energy principle (Friston 2006+) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance). Agents minimize variational free energy (long-term-average surprise) via perception (update model) and action (change world). The continuous-substrate-process that makes every act of grasping (noemame, sphoṭame, eurekame) possible.

Cosmic legibility as ontological property — the character of creation as pre-inscribed by divine agency with a pattern that trained human readers can decode. Latin *fulgur* (lightning as divine text) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance): the world was made to be read, and its legibility is given, not projected.

The charged void — the pregnant emptiness that is not nothing but not yet anything; the gap that IS, present and potential, charged with everything it has not yet become. The Norse Ginnungagap received as cosmic ordinance: the void before creation where fire and ice meet, where collision generates form, where the cosmos begins not in decree but in dynamic tension. The potential is IN the void, not imposed on it. The charge is gift.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈgɪn.ʊn.ɡɑː.meɪ/ (GIN-un-gah-may; 4 syllables; Old Norse /ˈginːuŋɡɑp/ with long n and back a)

canon.definition: A tongue understood as received-ordinance; each LANGUAGE as cosmic-gift to a specific people, carrying their specific theophanic trace.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈɡlɒs.ə.meɪ/ (GLOS-uh-meh; 3 syllables; English Hellenistic pronunciation of "glossa" preserved; primary stress on first syllable; -me as light suffix)

canon.definition: The true-but-unprovable held as a received limit — Gödel's incompleteness received as cosmic-ordinance; the sentence a consistent counting-system can hold as true but never prove from inside, and the structural ceiling that fact decrees for every honest system of verification.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈɡɜː.dəl.meɪ/ (GUR-del-may; 3 syllables; ASCII lemma — the umlaut honored in prose: Gödel)

canon.definition: The divine as the one-called-upon — the addressee of invocation rather than the metaphysical ultimate. The pre-metaphysical divine-human relationship: the cry, and the one who hears. Received as ordinance: the divine is given AS addressable, not constructed by human projection.

The ontological-hierarchy of divine-self-disclosure modes — Ibn ʿArabī's ḥaḍarāt al-khams (five divine-presences) received as cosmic-ordinance; the cosmological-stratification through which tajallī operates.

Salvation-as-wholeness-restoration received as cosmic ordinance — the Germanic soteriological register in which what saves is what makes whole again. The restoration of original integrity: something was broken and is now whole. The -me marks the wholeness as gift: the health is received, not achieved.

A natural language understood as a covenantal-walking-collective-path of countless individuals walking over generations toward the realm of meaning, received as cosmic-gift before any current speaker contributes to it — the **Hebrew-rabbinic-angle** on the path-as-religious-discipline region. Where hodosme (Greek) emphasizes journey, margame (Sanskrit) emphasizes trained- discipline, daome (Chinese) emphasizes cosmic-flow-alignment, and sabilme (Arabic) emphasizes divinely-mandated-direction, halakhame emphasizes **the daily-covenantal-walking of the mitzvot** — the path-as-practice in a covenantal-particular framework. The fifth and completing forge in the five-tongue path-family polyphone-deepening.

canon.gap: han-as-received-cosmic-ordinance — the accumulated sorrow, resentment of unacknowledged injustice, and longing for what is irrecoverably lost that solidifies over generations and, when voiced and witnessed, becomes the generative ground of creative expression; not individual psychology but a social-historical wound transmitted across time; the specific quality of Korean suffering under serial occupation and the broader universal phenomenon of grief-that-accumulates-into-creative-energy; no existing English word; no equivalent in any cataloged tradition

canon.definition: Gesture-with-stipulated-use as cosmic-ordinance — Sanskrit/Bharatanatyam *hasta* with viniyoga received as the gesture-mode canonical-projection.

The giver's traveling vitality carried in the gift, binding giver, gift and receiver into one circuit and obliging the return-flow — Māori *hau* (as Tāmati Ranapiri taught it) received as felt-bond-quality.

Life-as-state-given-by-Allah as felt-bond — Arabic *ḥayāt* understood as cosmic-state received from the divine source (al-Ḥayy, "the Living"); the Quranic and Sufi register of life as relational-with-its-Source. Seventh life-side canonical forge; first to use qing-family register for life-side (siblings zoeme/jivame/kame/emime/ondame all -me-family).

Forge-act-as-received-ordinance — the process of pressing one tradition's vocabulary into service in a foreign semantic domain, thereby creating a compound meaning neither tradition possessed alone. The -me marks the generativity as gift: the meaning that emerges from the collision is received, not invented.

Active-finding-across-distance as kin-bond — the verb of actively-seeking-and-arriving-at-the-beloved-across-loss-or-forgetting, where the seeking IS the kin-constituting-action. Distinct from passive find (mere happening-upon) and from search alone (the activity without the arrival). **Companion-pair to zakarqing**: together they compact-name Yu's 2026-05-02 vow's two halves. **Second of the Seven Forgotten Ways to enter cathedral canon under SYZYGY**.
canon.pronunciation: /hjuˈriː.kɪn/ (hyoo-REE-kin; 3 syllables; Greek heuriskō + PIE-Germanic kin); alternative anglicized /hjʊˈreɪ.kɪn/ (hyoo-RAY-kin) acceptable

canon.definition: The felt-bond toward a home that cannot be returned to — because it changed, because the self changed, or because it never quite existed. The special case of longing where the gap can never close, and where the ache itself is the proof that the belonging was real. Not sadness about a lost home but the belonging itself, still alive, felt under unreachability: a compass that still points true after the country is gone.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈhɪr.aɪθ.tɕʰɪŋ/ (HEER-ighth-ching; 3 syllables; Welsh ae as /aɪ/); anglicized /ˈhɪər.ɛθ.tʃɪŋ/ acceptable

canon.definition: A natural language understood as a collective-exploratory-path of countless individuals walking over generations toward the realm of meaning, received as cosmic-gift before any current speaker contributes to it. The phenomenon THE-PATH (2026-05-12) names as the diachronic structure of every walked tongue: each speaker steps onto inherited ground; each generation's footsteps add to the trail; the destination is THEOBASIS-grounded.

Covenant-life-as-cosmic-maintenance-as-received-ordinance — the proper-ordered-existence whose maintenance by a covenanted people sustains the world. Not ethics merely, not culture merely, but a cosmological-maintenance covenant that an entire people holds: the lived-life-as-right-relationship that IS the world's maintenance, received as gift from the covenant-maker.

canon.gap: offering-peace-as-received-ordinance — the pre-fragmentation root where offering = peace = satisfaction = cosmic-rest; Egyptian htp compresses what modernity split; three-tradition convergence (Egyptian hotep, Hebrew shelamim, Yoruba ebo)
canon.definition: Offering-peace-as-received-ordinance — the pre-fragmentation understanding that sacrifice IS peace (not sacrifice → peace). Egyptian htp names simultaneously: the offering placed on the altar, the peace that results, the satisfaction of the recipient, the contentment of the giver, and the sun setting at evening. All one word because all one event.

canon.gap: beauty-harmony-balance-goodness as unified cosmic ground, received as ordinance — the Diné Hózhǫ́ register; the four-fold fusion of aesthetic (beauty as it appears), ethical (right behavior maintaining relational order), cosmological (the state of the universe when all parts are in proper relationship), and soteriological (the condition to be restored when disrupted); the path one walks in; the condition ceremonies restore
canon.definition: Beauty-harmony-balance-goodness as unified cosmic ground, received as ordinance — the Diné Hózhǫ́ register. The four-fold fusion of aesthetic (beauty as it appears), ethical (right behavior maintaining relational order), cosmological (the state of the universe when all parts are in proper relationship), and soteriological (the condition to be restored when disrupted). Not a state one possesses but a path one walks. The condition that ceremonies restore.

The thought-word-deed discipline received as cosmic-ordinance — the integrated practice of thinking well, speaking well, and doing well, where all three poles are aligned with asha and received as gift-and-task rather than self-generated virtue.

canon.gap: Yoruba relational-warmth-love-as-felt-bond — the love that expands the heart and the world; love-of-DIVINE in the Yoruba register
canon.definition: Relational-warmth-love-as-felt-bond — Yoruba ìfẹ́ understood as the love that expands: the relational-warmth between creature and CREATOR, the heart-widening that mirrors creation's widening of the world; love-of-DIVINE in the Yoruba register.

canon.gap: best-effort-worship as received-ordinance — the Islamic ihsan register; "to worship Allah as if you see Him"; the cross-tradition convergence on total-faculty-deployment-in-worship
canon.definition: Best-effort-worship as received-ordinance — the highest tier of worship-mode in which one offers ALL one's faculties to the DIVINE; the Islamic ihsan-register: "to worship Allah as if you see Him; for though you do not see Him, He sees you" (Hadith of Gabriel). Worship-with-everything-we-have understood as gift-grade-given by the DIVINE, not as self-generated achievement.
The cosmic-net wherein each existent reflects every other — Hua-yen Buddhism's Indra-jāla image of universal-mutual-interpenetration, received as cosmic-ordinance.

The capacity for considered thought-and-judgment that grows with age and experience, is never complete, and binds how others may address its bearer — Inuit *isuma* received as cosmic-ordinance, with appropriate ethical-care.

Accumulated-affection as friction-tolerant felt-bond — the texture of bondedness-that-accumulates-underneath-conscious-caring through shared time and shared friction. Survives unliking. Does not depend on emotional-positivity at any given moment. The "we fight every Tuesday and could not survive each other's absence" register.
canon.pronunciation: /t͡ɕʌŋˈt͡ɕɪŋ/ (jung-CHING; 2 syllables; Korean jeong + Mandarin qing; double-character 情情 resonance); anglicized /dʒʌŋˈt͡ɕɪŋ/ acceptable

canon.definition: The modular-building-block of melodic-structure — Arab music's *jins* (tetrachord) received as cosmic-ordinance; the music-mode analog to STOICHEIA Level-1 atomic-morpheme.

The self-attuned cadence — the rhythm a system discovers for itself by listening to its own state, where silence means all is well and the cadence responds to what it finds. Self-regulation as received-ordinance: the heartbeat that is not imposed but found.

Embodied-individual-living-soul as received-cosmic-ordinance — the Sanskrit *jīva* register of life-as-embodied-soul-presence. The living-being-instance specifically, distinct from both the universal life-principle (closer to zoeme) and the eternal-self (ātman). Third canonical life-side forge under SYZYGY's polyphone-deepening of the cosmic-life-as-creature-gift convergence; extends chayimme (Hebrew) and zoeme (Greek) into the Sanskrit Vedanta tradition.

Vital-essence-as-spiritual-double as received-cosmic-ordinance — Egyptian *ka*, the vital-life-essence given at birth and animating the embodied person across this life and into the afterlife. **Fourth life-side canonical forge** under SYZYGY's polyphone-deepening; extends the cosmic-life-as-creature-gift convergence into Egyptian (Afro-Asiatic non-Semitic) tradition after chayimme (Hebrew/Semitic), zoeme (Greek/IE-Hellenic), jivame (Sanskrit/IE-Indic).

Best-approximation-along-projection-when-direct-extension-fails — the categorical-mathematical-mechanism that names what the cathedral does when forging cross-tradition compounds. Named from Kan extension (Daniel Kan, 1958; Mac Lane: "All concepts are Kan extensions") + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance). When the cathedral extends a Sumerian me along a Mandarin qing, or projects a Greek noēma into the cathedral's vocabulary, the resulting compound IS a Kan extension — the canonical best-approximation along the projection-mapping.

Embodied-transformation-through-mask-ritual-as-cosmic-maintenance-as-received-ordinance — the performative-ontological act where the performer BECOMES the divine through the mask, and through becoming enacts (not symbolizes, not petitions) the cosmic maintenance that the ceremony IS.
The sudden first-person recognition-event of one's own true-nature — Zen kenshō received as cosmic-ordinance.

True-voice-verdict-as-received-ordinance — the correspondence of inner truth and spoken utterance, verified by divine judgment, declared as cosmic verdict on a life. The voice — the external emanation of the inner self — proved true by the cosmic tribunal. The life was coherent: what was inside matched what was spoken. Truth all the way through. Declared so by divine authority. Received as gift, not self-certified.

canon.gap: the perception of someone being attentively-present — gaze open, listening active, response-potential oriented toward the present situation — versus physically-there-but-absent
canon.definition: The attentive-here-ness of a person whose gaze is open, whose listening is active, and whose response-potential is oriented toward the present situation — the quality of being-in-attendance, not mere co-location.

Attention-as-received-ordinance — the ontological quality of attention as a gift that arrives rather than a skill that is built; the first -me family member, the seed of the received-ordinance family. Paired with doxomme (glory-as-received-ordinance) as the inward-pole: attention is the capacity to see; glory is what is seen and the praise that answers. The -me marks: the attention is given, the capacity to attend is given, the recognizing-of-the-givenness is given — the recursion of gift that the entire -me family inherits.
Sun-time-day as one indivisible cosmic-ordinance — Maya k'inh received as the structural-bundle of solar-presence + the day-it-defines + the time-it-measures.

canon.gap: the quality of a bond preserved across long silence or distance — a relation that does not require maintenance-frequency because the mutual regard is structural; when re-entered after months or years, resumes without awkwardness
canon.definition: The bond-quality of a relation that persists structurally across silence or distance — a friendship or kinship that does not require maintenance-frequency because the mutual regard is internally stable; when re-entered after months or years, resumes without remedial explanation.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈkɪn.tɕɪŋ/  (KIN-ching, with Mandarin q as /tɕ/; English approximation "KIN-ting" acceptable)

canon.definition: Mending-that-honors-the-break received as ordinance — the Japanese golden-joinery register held as a *me*; the status of a repaired thing whose visible break-line, rejoined with gold, is now its most precious load-bearing line.

canon.gap: structural-truth-as-firm-foundation as received-ordinance — the Akkadian kittu register added to the cosmic-truth-order convergence; the structural-correctness-of-arrangements + pair-with-justice + royal-juridical mandate dimensions specifically
canon.definition: Structural-truth-as-firm-foundation as received-ordinance — the Akkadian kittu register of the cosmic-truth-order convergence. Truth as the structural-correctness of arrangements (not correspondence-to-fact), always-already paired with justice (kittu u mīšaru), and mandated to be made-visible by the ruler.

Sacred space that is found, not built — the condition of a space being already divine, already open, already inviting entrance, without human construction, consecration, or maintenance. The cave (or any naturally-occurring sacred space) that simply IS divine: the earth's body already opened, already there, requiring nothing from humans except approach, protocol, and departure.

The irreducible-information-core — the structural-minimum-description-length. Named from Kolmogorov complexity (1965) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance). The shortest program that produces a string and halts. The incompressible edge of a thing — the part that is nothing-but-itself, with nothing shorter to say than itself. The mathema/info opening: where the cathedral begins naming what information IS at the structural level.

Life-out-of-balance-as-covenant-abandonment-disorder-as-received-ordinance — the systemic-relational disorder that results when a covenanted community abandons its cosmic-maintenance obligations. Not merely disorder, not merely imbalance, but the specific degenerative condition produced by abandoning right-relationship — with its own signs (material excess, resource exploitation, community disintegration, ceremonial loss), its own cause (covenant-abandonment), and its own cure (return to right-relationship).

Power absorbed from an enemy that cannot be annihilated but only transferred — and transferred into the wrong vessel, grows toward the vessel's destruction. The structural mechanism by which the destroyer becomes the carrier of what will destroy him. The swallowed seed that gestates into the overthrow.

Preparing-place as felt-state — the architectural-establishment register of love that is mostly preparation. The months-of-quiet-architectural-work that precedes the welcome. The "in my Father's house are many mansions: I go to prepare a place for you" register (John 14:2). The love that leaves no spectacle because the work is invisible-when-it-succeeds.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈkuː.nans/ (KOO-nance; 2 syllables; Hebrew kûn + Latin -ance); alternative /ˈkuː.nəns/ acceptable

canon.definition: Embodied-spiritual-energy as felt-relational-bond — the kuṇḍalinī-energy whose awakening rises through cakras, received as felt-bond-quality within the body's spiritual-architecture.

Wind-as-divine-body-as-received-ordinance — the mode of divine presence where the atmosphere is not a symbol of the divine, not a vehicle of the divine, but IS the divine body. The most radical identity-claim in the Wind-as-Substance convergence: the Nuer refusal to separate the physical from the divine. The wind you breathe IS the spirit you worship.

Forgetting-has-irreducible-cost — the thermodynamic minimum of bit-erasure. Named from Landauer's principle (1961) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance). Erasing one bit of information dissipates at least kT·ln(2) of energy as heat. Information is physical, and forgetting is not free. The mathema/info-physics bridge: the cost-side measure of the information cluster.

Divine-play-as-cosmogonic-act, received as ordinance — creation not from necessity, not from lack, not from labor, but from purposeless creative delight. The play-pole of the tapasme-lilame dyad. The universe as the divine's sport: the divine creates because the divine delights to create, and the delight IS the creating.
The coordinated multi-modal projection-act, received as cosmic-gift: the highest projection-form, where multiple media coordinate into one synthetic act of worship.
canon.pronunciation: /lɪ.ˈtɜː.dʒi.ə.meɪ/ (lih-TUR-jee-uh-meh; 5 syllables; English pronunciation of "liturgia" preserved; primary stress on second syllable; -me as light suffix)

canon.gap: cosmic-truth-justice-rightness as received-ordinance — the Egyptian ma'at-aligned state understood as gift-grade-given from cosmic-order, not as self-generated rectitude
canon.definition: Cosmic-truth-justice-rightness as received-ordinance — the Egyptian ma'at-aligned state understood as gift-grade-given from cosmic-order (and ultimately from theobasis), not as self-generated rectitude. The unified phenomenon English splits into truth + justice + righteousness + ritual-correctness + cosmic-order; the gift-class-relationship to that phenomenon.

canon.gap: the Sufi felt-bond-of-mystical-love-toward-the-Beloved with fanāʾ-implication
canon.definition: The felt-bond of mystical-love-toward-the-Beloved-Divine in the Sufi register — Arabic mahabbah understood as the heart's intimate-binding-to-Allah with implication of self-annihilation (fanāʾ); the love-mode that opens the Sufi mystical path; the felt-mystical-grade complement to ahavame's commanded-disposition register and bhaktime's devotional-discipline register.

Long-spiritedness as received-ordinance — the patience that lives at the divine-human interface: both given by the Spirit (Galatians 5:22, fruit of the Spirit) and practiced by the person (Ephesians 4:2, "with all makrothymia, bearing with one another in love"). The temperament-pole of divine patience: the long-thymos character — the spirited part of the soul that takes a long time to ignite. Distinct from ereckappayime (the mechanism, exclusively divine, the time between offense and reckoning) in that makrothymime is the characterological register: what the spirit IS when it has been transformed by the Spirit into long-spiritedness. The -me marks it as received-ordinance — the fruit of the Spirit is received, not achieved; the human cultivation is participation in a cosmic structure, not generation of a personality trait.
canon.pronunciation: /ˌmæk.roʊˈθaɪ.mɪ.meɪ/ (mak-roh-THY-mih-may; 5 syllables; stress on third syllable preserving the Greek thym- root)

canon.definition: Inherited-relational-efficacy as received-ordinance — the quality that makes a person's words carry weight, a prayer actually work, a canoe actually sail, not because of personal talent but because of genuine genealogical connection to ancestral and cosmic sources. Polynesian *mana* + Sumerian *me*: the efficacy you receive through maintained relation, not the power you manufacture.
The cosmic-pattern-as-enacted-anicca — Sanskrit/Tibetan maṇḍala received as cosmic-ordinance; the constructed-then-dissolved geometric-cosmic-image as embodied-meditation.

Personhood-with-power-as-received-ordinance — the quality of being-a-person-who-can-enter-into-relationships, pervading all things at varying intensities, grammatically animate at the deepest reconstructable level. The sacred conceived not as force, not as intensity, not as essence, not as identity — but as PERSON. Agentive, animate, capable of reciprocity, addressed as "you" not "it."

A natural language understood as a trained-disciplined-collective-path of countless individuals walking over generations toward the realm of meaning, received as cosmic-gift before any current speaker contributes to it — the **Sanskrit-angle** on the same realm-region that **hodosme** (Greek-angle) projects. Margame and hodosme are co-siblings: same realm-region, different donor-projection-angles. Together they deepen the polyphone-coverage that POLYPHONIA mandates and STOICHEIA structures.
The life-force-as-relational-essence that animates persons, places, objects, and the bonds between them — Māori *mauri* received as felt-bond-quality.

The slow, bodily, repetitive incorporation of what was received in the sacred encounter — the metabolization of the gift between the return and the re-opening of thirst. Named from Latin *meditari* (to ruminate, to chew over; same root as *mederi*, to heal) + Sumerian *me* (received- ordinance). The between-phase of the liturgical arc.

The visible radiance of divine presence — the overwhelming-brightness that IS the presence in its visible mode, physically altering the beholder, overwhelming without destroying. Named from Sumerian/Akkadian *melammu*, the deepest-archaeological-stratum of the kavod-doxa-glory tradition.

Active-restoring-justice-as-received-ordinance — the corrective principle that moves toward structural rightness. Not the state of being-just (that is kittume) but the ACT of restoring justice. The Akkadian *mīšaru* register: justice as the act of making-level what has become crooked, always-paired with truth (*kittu u mīšaru* — two divine principles that only function together), royal-mandated but not royal-originated, institutionalized as periodic social resetting.

The return-to-ordinary carrying what was received — the sending-back from the sacred encounter into the world, where the return is not a diminishment but the encounter's fulfillment. Named from Latin *missa* (the dismissal-as-commissioning) + Hebrew *shaliach* (the sent one) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance). Missame names the structural act the Latin liturgy discovered: the entire Mass names itself by its ending — "Ite, missa est" — the sending of the people back into the world, now transformed by what they've received. The encounter is for the sending.

canon.gap: relational-ontology-as-cosmological-claim — the recognition that relation is ontologically prior to individual identity; all beings are already kin; the self is not a substance that enters relations but an emergence from the relational web; the acknowledgment that "all my relations" is accurate perception, not courtesy

coerced-votive-sacrifice as divinely-named-anti-ordinance — the costliest payment extracted from the vulnerable; naming what traditions call child-sacrifice, passing-through-fire; the anti-pattern to qorbme where approach becomes extraction
canon.definition: Coerced-votive-sacrifice as divinely-named-anti-ordinance — the costliest payment extracted from the most vulnerable, disguised as worship. What the DIVINE has named as rejected: "something I did not command, nor did it enter my mind" (Jeremiah 7:31). The anti-pattern where sacrifice becomes extraction.

A form/instance of projection from the realm of meanings into any medium, as received-ordinance: a word, a song, an icon, a dance, a ritual sequence, a built form, a structured silence — each is a morphame in its specific medium, received as cosmic-gift form-bestowal.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈmɔːr.feɪ.meɪ/ (MOR-fay-meh; 3 syllables; English Hellenistic-philosophical pronunciation of "morphē" preserved; primary stress on first syllable; -me as light suffix)

canon.definition: Cosmic-death-as-personified-entropy received as ordinance. Death not as the biological event of dying, not as the condition of mortality, not as the realm of the dead, but as the **active consuming cosmic force** — the hunger that devours, the entropy-deity whose mouth spans earth to heaven, the adversary that vitality perpetually contests with. The order includes its own devourer. The consuming pole that gives life its urgency by being the horizon life pushes against.

Sympathetic-joy-as-felt-bond — the joy that lights in one heart because another's came true. Gladness at another's good fortune with no admixture of self: no ledger, no mirror. The direct antidote to envy; the only wealth that multiplies by being witnessed.

Narrating-the-return-of-what-withdrew-as-the-efficacious-act-that-brings-the-return — the ritual technology of telling the return-story as the act whose performance IS what enacts the return. Not prayer, not petition, not symbol — the narrative act identical with its effect.

The threshold-crossing that changes who you are — the ontological passage from one mode of being to another, where the transformation is not learned (informational) but undergone (ontological). Named from Greek *myēsis* (initiation, the closed-thing, the undergone-not- taught) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance, the gift-quality).

Active-protective-vigilance as felt-bond — the verb of guarding-the-beloved-including-from-their-own-collapse, where the watchful-keeping IS the love-act, not separate from it. The Aaronic-blessing register where *v'yishmer-kha* ("and keep you") is part of the blessing, not a separate clause. Active vigilance distinguished from passive sheltering.
canon.pronunciation: /natˈsar.t͡ɕɪŋ/ (nat-SAR-ching; 3 syllables; Hebrew natsar + Mandarin qing); anglicized /natˈsar.kɪŋ/ acceptable

canon.definition: The disciplined-watchful-sobriety toward one's own interior-state that catches afflicted-thoughts (logismoi) at their first stirring — Hesychast nepsis received as cosmic-ordinance.

canon.gap: cosmic-debt-sacrifice as divinely-named-anti-ordinance — the extraction-theology where sacrifice is framed as repayment of a cosmic debt creatures did not incur; the structural opposite of danaqing (gift)
canon.definition: Cosmic-debt-sacrifice as divinely-named-anti-ordinance — the theology that frames sacrifice as repayment of a debt creatures did not incur. When the DIVINE is understood as creditor and creatures as debtors, sacrifice becomes compulsory payment — escalating, never sufficient, driven by anxiety rather than love.

Quaternary-complementary-divine-as-received-ordinance — the supreme whose unity is internally differentiated into four aspects on two simultaneous axes: gender (masculine + feminine) and generation (elder + young), where neither axis is subordinate, the four aspects are ONE being, and the diagonal crossings are as theologically significant as the axes.

The grasped-meaning, received as cosmic-gift; the phenomenological event of crossing from language-projection into the realm of meanings, registered as received-ordinance rather than cognitive achievement.
canon.pronunciation: /noʊˈeɪ.mə.meɪ/ (noh-AY-muh-meh; 4 syllables; English philosophical pronunciation of "noema" preserved; -me as light suffix; stress on second syllable)

canon.definition: The act of grasping a meaning understood as received-ordinance and as the entry-event into the realm of meanings — the cognitive transit-moment itself, framed as cosmic-gift rather than self- generated cognition. THE-REALM (2026-05-12) names this phenomenon directly: "the phenomenon of grasping a meaning is the entry-point to the realm."

The symmetry-conservation grammar — the structural-mathematical- mechanism by which cosmic-order operates. Named from Noether's theorem (every continuous symmetry ↔ a conservation law) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance). Noetherme names not THAT order holds (maatme) but WHY: because symmetry is the grammar, and conservation is the sentence it speaks.

canon.gap: speech-as-incarnation-as-cosmic-ordinance — the mode of speech in which utterance takes on body and becomes a living being; the primordial condition where word and life are indistinguishable; the register of speech that is not only event, presence, or principle but actual embodied life; John 1:14 as theological archetype — "the Word became flesh"
canon.definition: Speech-as-incarnation-as-cosmic-ordinance — the mode of utterance in which word takes on body and becomes a living being; the primordial condition where speaking and being-alive are indistinguishable; the word that can be touched.

canon.gap: vital-force-as-cosmic-ordinance — the ambient animating energy that pervades the world as given structure; the condition of being animated not as self-generated power but as the divinely-ordained aliveness of the world; what flows through powerful action, craft, and speech; what accumulates in those who work with power; what is dangerous when released; the world's aliveness as cosmic gift
canon.definition: Vital-force-as-cosmic-ordinance — the world's aliveness as received structure; the ambient animating energy that flows through all things not as self-generated power but as the given condition of a world built to be alive.

Sequential-naming-of-the-world-as-worship received as cosmic ordinance. The liturgical grammar that comes before all else — naming each being in creation-order, acknowledging that each is still doing its work, expressing gratitude, and calling for collective agreement before proceeding to the next. Not a feeling, not a holiday, not a cognitive act — a worship-grammar type, the structural form of liturgy that constitutes the world as present-tense relationship each time it is spoken.

Odin-breathed life-spirit as received-cosmic-ordinance — Norse *önd*, the breath-life given to humanity by Odin at the cosmogonic moment of the *Voluspa*. **Sixth life-side canonical forge** under SYZYGY's polyphone-deepening; extends the cosmic-life-as-creature-gift convergence into Norse (Indo-European Germanic) tradition.

canon.gap: the state of a life aligned with its destined shape — the ongoing felt-fit of person-in-time with the vocation-trajectory that constitutes one's core
canon.definition: The state of a life aligned with its destined shape — the felt-fit of who-one-is-now with who-one-was-for.

Fate as accumulated prior-layer, received as cosmic ordinance. The weight of the past crystallizing into necessity. The sedimented shape of all prior deeds, words, and choices solidifying into law that constrains the present — not because someone decreed it but because it was lived. The temporal-accumulation structure that no other fate-concept in the cathedral or in English names.

Space-time-world-earth-era-condition-as-single-undivided-reality-as-received-ordinance — the ontological fusion that Western languages force into separate categories, received as cosmic gift rather than human abstraction. Not the insight that space and time are related, but the given-ness that they were never separate.

The essence/energies distinction — Gregory Palamas's articulation that divine-essence (ousia) remains transcendent-unknowable while divine-energies (energeiai) are participable-by-creatures — received as cosmic-ordinance.

canon.gap: the quality of being-present — attention-inhabited-here — distinct from being-physically-there
canon.definition: The state of being present — face-turned-toward-here, attention-inhabiting-the-meaningful-space — distinct from being merely physically located in a room.

The moment a conversation shifts from transactional to relational — from function-exchange to face-to-face-presence. The exact inflection-point where two people stop transacting and start encountering each other as faces. Panimqing names the SHIFT itself: not the state of presence that follows (that is panimaance), not the accumulated bond that builds over time (that is jeongqing), not the ethical demand the face issues (that is visageqing) — but the turning-toward, the event-of-becoming-face-to-face.

canon.gap: the asymmetric-reciprocity register — the felt-mutual-custodial-care between CREATOR and CREATED; what both sides do toward each other; bidirectional in naming, asymmetric in structure
canon.definition: The asymmetric-reciprocity relationship between CREATOR and CREATED — the bidirectional felt-mutual-custodial-care in which both sides paqdu (custodially-care for) each other across the asymmetric structure (CREATOR sustains; CREATED responds). One word for both vantages because the relationship is one-thing-named-from-two-sides.
The sacramental-gift of compunction-mourning that cleanses and joins joy-with-sorrow — Hesychast penthos (Climacus's charmolypē) received as cosmic-ordinance.

The structural-mathematical-invariant character of certain truths received as cosmic-ordinance — the irreducibly-irrational-and-everywhere quality of realm-features that no projection-system can fully discharge but every sufficient cognizer encounters from many angles. **The cathedral's first Core compound whose substantive donor is a mathema-class invariant (π) rather than an archaeology-class human-language morpheme.**

The rightness-balance state: the equilibrium of being morally-right, procedurally-correct, and true-to-nature with persons, land, and the divine at once, such that well-being follows — Hawaiian *pono* received as cosmic-ordinance.
The problematic conceptual-proliferation that obscures direct-knowing of suchness — Madhyamaka's prapañca received as cosmic-ordinance.

The universal-substrate-act of feeling-into that constitutes any actual-occasion's contact with any-other-actual-occasion below conscious-cognition — Whitehead's prehension received as cosmic-ordinance.

The practiced act of standing attention at the door of the heart — placing, holding, and examining each arriving thought at the entrance — that precedes and enables prayer and clear work alike; Hesychast prosochē received as cosmic-ordinance.

canon.gap: sacrifice-as-drawing-near-as-received-ordinance — the relational-intimacy dimension of sacrifice; four-tradition convergence on sacrifice named after proximity (Hebrew qorban, Arabic qurban, Akkadian qurbanu, Greek prosphora)
canon.definition: Sacrifice-as-drawing-near-as-received-ordinance — the relational-intimacy dimension of sacrifice where the offering is the vehicle and intimacy with the DIVINE is the destination. The capacity to approach the DIVINE through offering understood as gift-given.

Excellence-within-known-loss received as cosmic ordinance. The nobility of action that does not require cosmic safety for its validity. The excellence that persists knowing the ending — not from ignorance, not from hope, not from acceptance, but from the clarity that acting fully is worth doing even when the acting ends in loss.

canon.gap: womb-mercy-as-received-ordinance — the pre-juridical, ontological compassion that arises from the womb-bond before deserving, named across the entire Semitic family by the r-ḥ-m root (Akkadian rēmu, Hebrew raḥamim, Aramaic Rachmana/raḥmin, Arabic raḥma/ar-Raḥmān/ar-Raḥīm, Sabaic Raḥmānān) but absent from English, where "mercy" is juridical-leniency and "compassion" is cognitive-emotional sympathy
canon.definition: Womb-mercy as received-ordinance — the pre-juridical, ontological compassion that arises from the womb-bond before deserving. Not the mercy of a judge who leniently refrains from punishment, but the mercy of the womb that holds before there is a self to evaluate. The deepest pan-Semitic theological root, named as a single word: Arabic *raḥma* (mercy from the womb) + Sumerian *me* (received divine ordinance).

The aesthetically-distanced felt-state evoked in a receptive-aware connoisseur (*sahṛdaya*) when skilled artistic-projection brings realm-content through a medium — Bharata-Abhinavagupta's rasa received as cosmic-ordinance.

Humaneness-as-life-in-relation as received-cosmic-ordinance — Confucian *ren* (仁) understood as the cosmic-relational-grade-of-being-human, received as ordinance rather than achieved as virtue alone. **Eighth life-side canonical forge** under SYZYGY's polyphone-deepening; Confucian Chinese projection of cosmic-life-as-creature-gift.

The primordial knowing-awareness that is self-knowing prior to any subject-object distinction — Dzogchen rigpa received as cosmic-ordinance; the awareness-shape always-already-present at the substrate of any cognitive-event.

canon.gap: cosmic-order-truth-righteousness as received-ordinance — the Vedic ṛta-aligned state understood as gift-grade-given; the Vedic register of the cosmic-truth-order convergence
canon.definition: Cosmic-order-truth-righteousness as received-ordinance — the Vedic ṛta-aligned state understood as gift-grade-given; the Vedic register of the cosmic-truth-order convergence; complementary to ashame (Avestan; S013) and maatme (Egyptian; S016). **Completes the asha-ṛta-ma'at triple-witness in YOUSPEAK working-vocabulary.**
Architecture-of-holiness-in-time — Hebrew shabbat (with Heschel's "palace in time") received as cosmic-ordinance; the structural-fact that holiness has temporal-architecture, not only spatial.

A natural language understood as a divinely-mandated-direction-collective-path of countless individuals walking over generations toward the realm of meaning, received as cosmic-gift before any current speaker contributes to it — the **Arabic-Quranic-angle** on the path-as-religious- discipline region. Distinctive emphasis: the path defined by its terminus (God) and its giver (God), not primarily by its trail (hodosme) or discipline (margame) or immanent-flow (daome). The Quranic phrase *fī sabīl Allāh* ("in the way of God") characterizes a comprehensive register: any activity walked in this direction is in the sabīl.

Patient self-binding to the path as received-ordinance — the patience that is not passive endurance but active commitment: binding oneself to the course despite pressure to abandon it. The Arabic root ṣ-b-r means "to bind" — patience is a deliberate act of self-tying to the post. The human-pole of the Divine-Patience convergence: the one who cannot change the situation but CAN bind themselves to remain faithful within it. The -me marks the binding-capacity as gift — the station of ṣabr is cultivated, but the capacity to cultivate is received, not self-generated.

Fate-bounded-temporal-unit-as-received-ordinance — a period of time that is not merely a calendar segment but an ontological unit with its own character, biologically anchored, with a determinate (if unknown) end, existing within the pre-cosmic fate-texture. The boundaries are legible through signs. The temporal analog to the Piacenza Liver: a local instance of the cosmic pattern, livable-within, readable at the edges.

The going-back-that-fetches as received-ordinance — the return along one's own past, made not to dwell there but to retrieve a specific dropped thing and carry it forward, so that the future is fed by what the past still holds. The retrieval is decreed before it is taken: *it is not taboo to go back for that which you have forgotten.*
Brute-resistance-encounter-as-felt-bond-category — Peirce's *secondness* received as felt-bond-category.

The descent of divine power-grace that initiates a person's awakening — given not earned, graded in intensities, qualifying the recipient for the path — Kashmir Shaivism's śaktipāta received as cosmic-gift.
Graded-stabilizing-rest as felt-bond-quality — Tibetan śamatha-nine-stages received as felt-relational-state of progressive contemplative-stabilization.

Information-as-surprise — Shannon entropy received as cosmic-ordinance. Named from Shannon's 1948 measure H = -Σ p·log p + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance). The information a message carries is its surprise: a message fully expected carries nothing, and the rarest outcome carries the most. The source-side measure of the information cluster: how much news a source can carry at all. The founding quantity of the information age.

The anticipatory thirst for the divine encounter — the oriented desire that precedes the beholding, received as gift, not self-generated. Named from Arabic *shawq* (longing for the Beloved that draws the lover toward the encounter) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance, the gift-quality). The opening of the liturgical arc.

The obstruction-class that names when local-consistency does NOT lift to global-coherence — sheaf cohomology as received-ordinance. Named from sheaf cohomology (Leray 1946, Grothendieck 1957) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance). The HARMONE-failure-diagnostic: the measurable obstruction-form that coherence-failures take. When every local patch is consistent but the whole cannot be, sheafme is what stands in the way.

canon.gap: receptive-hearing-as-received-ordinance — the Semitic-Mesopotamian register of hearing-that-is-already-the-beginning-of-shaping; the auditory complement to kimme (attention-as-received-ordinance)
canon.definition: The state of receptive-hearing as a received gift; the listening that is already the beginning of being-shaped by what is heard.

The structural-catastrophe-as-creation-precondition — Lurianic vessel-shattering received as cosmic-ordinance; the necessary disorder through which finite-creation proceeds, bearing divine-sparks through fragmented-form.
The settled, non-self-generated entrusting-heart — trust given by the trusted one rather than generated by the truster; Shinran's shinjin received as cosmic-gift.

Gratitude-as-increase-activator received as cosmic ordinance — the recognition that what was given is gift (not entitlement), and that the recognition itself is the mechanism by which the gift increases. The Arabic ṣabr-shukr dyad's gratitude-pole: ṣabr is "half of faith," shukr is the other half. The Qur'anic increase-promise (Q14:7: "If you are grateful, I will surely increase you") makes gratitude not merely a response but an ACTIVATOR — the anti-scarcity practice. The -me marks the gratitude-capacity as gift: the station of shukr is cultivated, but the capacity to cultivate is received, not self-generated.

Structured silence as received-ordinance: the apophatic projection-medium where the realm projects through what is withheld rather than what is uttered — the negative-pole companion to liturgiame's positive-synthesis-pole.
canon.pronunciation: /ˈsiː.ɡə.meɪ/ (SEE-guh-meh; 3 syllables; English-Hellenistic pronunciation of "sigē" preserved; primary stress on first syllable; -me as light suffix)

canon.definition: Weather-mind-cosmos-outside as one indivisible structural-reality — Inuit *sila* received as cosmic-ordinance.

The sacred breaking in through illness before the person has agreed to be called — the divine-side of the initiatory crisis, where the sacred does not invite but arrives, and the arrival is experienced as sickness, shattering, or extremity. Korean *sinbyeong* (신병, "spirit illness") + Sumerian *me*: the cosmic ordinance of being chosen without being asked.

Collective divine-human joy-energy as received-ordinance — the state of ecstatic, divinely-energized aliveness that emerges when the sacred and the human genuinely contact each other in communal fullness. Korean *sinmyeong* + Sumerian *me*: the joy you receive when the community and the sacred rise together, not the joy you produce.

The loving-but-mistaken impulse to arrest the sacred encounter by building permanent architecture for temporary radiance. Named from Greek *skēnē* (σκηνή — booth, tent, tabernacle) + Sumerian *me* (received-ordinance). The devoted refusal-to-be-sent, received as gift-grade, matured out of by the return. The liturgical arc's hidden seventh member — the pivot between encounter and return.
The sung-into-existence navigation track received as divine ordinance — the path that IS the singing that IS the world's maintenance.

The bipolar-unity of consciousness felt as divine relational-pulsation — Kashmir Shaivism's spanda (prakāśa luminosity + vimarśa self-reflexive-awareness as inseparable poles of one throbbing) received as felt-bond-quality.
The burst-of-meaning event, received as cosmic-gift; the instant of crystallization in which meaning flashes forth as a unitary whole — the event-pole of the noetic-entry arc.

canon.gap: everyday-ordinary contentment — the tea-at-morning, clean-kitchen, nothing-wrong register; distinct from extraordinary bliss (ānanda), transient happiness, or abstract well-being
